title: Encapsulation, Properties, and Descriptors
description: Protect borrower limits, item status, and identifier rules while keeping a small usable public API. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an invariant-protecting circulation model while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Hide representation through behavior-oriented public APIs rather than access-modifier imitation.
Use properties and descriptors only when managed attribute behavior is valuable.
Design mutation, validation, and immutability contracts that callers can trust.
